subject: Gaming
title: Indie Publisher Paradox
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Indie Publisher Paradox.

hook.text: Indie means independent. So why do so many indie studios sign with publishers? The paradox is real.

buildup.text: Publishers like Devolver Digital, Annapurna, and Raw Fury offer funding, marketing, and platform connections.

discovery.text: These 'indie publishers' give creative freedom while handling business. They take a revenue share in return.

twist.text: Annapurna Interactive nearly shut down in 2024 when most staff resigned. Dependence on publishers has risks.

climax.text: The indie publisher model works until it doesn't. Creative freedom with financial safety is a delicate balance.

punchline.text: Independent but published. The paradox powers modern indie gaming.

quiz.question: What do indie publishers like Devolver Digital provide?
options: Funding, marketing, and platform connections while preserving creative freedom
Complete creative control over the game
